name: Console Table with Chrome Frame - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
This Console Table with Chrome Frame from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia is perfect for updating your entryway, living room or hallway with modern appeal. The rectangular console table showcases two brown wood-finish open shelves, paired with a chrome-plated steel frame in a shiny silver finish for eye-catching contrast. The open shelves provide plenty of space to display decorative items, store books or keep everyday essentials within reach. Its sleek, minimalistic design complements a variety of decor styles, making it a versatile addition to your home.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 46 inches
Overall Height: 32.25 inches
Overall Depth: 16 inches
Shelf Width: 44.25 inches
Shelf depth: 14.25 inches
Distance between top and shelf: 14.75 inches
Distance from floor to the bottom of shelf: 14.75 inches
